prompt: A young adult East Asian woman stands on a classic stone terrace, framed from head to thighs. She faces away from the camera at a three-quarter back angle, slightly turned to the left; her arms extend naturally forward, hands resting lightly on a rough beige-grey stone railing. She looks back naturally over her left shoulder at the camera, head slightly lowered, gaze calm and direct, expression restrained, confident, slightly aloof, lips naturally closed. She has a delicate soft oval face, almond-shaped dark brown eyes, natural thin eyebrows, a slender bridge of the nose, and soft nude-pink lips. Light makeup, focused on detailed eyeliner, natural lashes, and a slight warm blush. The skin is warm beige, retaining real pores, fine vellus hair, natural skin tone variations, and slight highlights; no plastic skin smoothing. Deep black hair is loosely gathered into a slightly messy low bun, with natural volume at the crown and fine strands blown by the breeze near the ears and neck. Wearing small gold dangle earrings. She wears an ivory or light cream premium sleeveless gown, stand-up collar, sharp shoulder tailoring, made of fine matte silk satin or premium crepe. The gown features a large, flowing, waist-deep oval backless opening, edges clean and snug, fully showcasing the shoulder blades and back lines; naturally cinched at the waist, the skirt hangs vertically and smoothly, no patterns, no extra decorations. The background consists of layered green forests and hills in the distance, softly blurred due to a telephoto lens and atmospheric perspective. The sky is bright but with no visible sun, using natural diffused light from thin clouds or an overcast sky. The skin tone, white gown, and stone railing have soft and delicate light-to-dark transitions, overall low saturation, low contrast, dominated by ivory white, warm skin tones, taupe stone, and soft forest green. Photography style: 85mm portrait lens, f/2, eye-level position slightly above the waist, shallow depth of field, clear eyes, real optical bokeh, luxury high-fashion editorial, slight film grain, photorealistic. Avoid: frontal poses, incorrect backless shape, shoulders too narrow, distorted spine, incorrect fingers, plastic skin, heavy makeup, strong sunlight, excessive HDR, CG, illustration, text, watermarks, logos.
promptEn: A young adult East Asian woman stands on a classic stone terrace, framed from head to thighs. She faces away from the camera at a three-quarter back angle, slightly turned to the left; her arms extend naturally forward, hands resting lightly on a rough beige-grey stone railing. She looks back naturally over her left shoulder at the camera, head slightly lowered, gaze calm and direct, expression restrained, confident, slightly aloof, lips naturally closed. She has a delicate soft oval face, almond-shaped dark brown eyes, natural thin eyebrows, a slender bridge of the nose, and soft nude-pink lips. Light makeup, focused on detailed eyeliner, natural lashes, and a slight warm blush. The skin is warm beige, retaining real pores, fine vellus hair, natural skin tone variations, and slight highlights; no plastic skin smoothing. Deep black hair is loosely gathered into a slightly messy low bun, with natural volume at the crown and fine strands blown by the breeze near the ears and neck. Wearing small gold dangle earrings. She wears an ivory or light cream premium sleeveless gown, stand-up collar, sharp shoulder tailoring, made of fine matte silk satin or premium crepe. The gown features a large, flowing, waist-deep oval backless opening, edges clean and snug, fully showcasing the shoulder blades and back lines; naturally cinched at the waist, the skirt hangs vertically and smoothly, no patterns, no extra decorations. The background consists of layered green forests and hills in the distance, softly blurred due to a telephoto lens and atmospheric perspective. The sky is bright but with no visible sun, using natural diffused light from thin clouds or an overcast sky. The skin tone, white gown, and stone railing have soft and delicate light-to-dark transitions, overall low saturation, low contrast, dominated by ivory white, warm skin tones, taupe stone, and soft forest green. Photography style: 85mm portrait lens, f/2, eye-level position slightly above the waist, shallow depth of field, clear eyes, real optical bokeh, luxury high-fashion editorial, slight film grain, photorealistic. Avoid: frontal poses, incorrect backless shape, shoulders too narrow, distorted spine, incorrect fingers, plastic skin, heavy makeup, strong sunlight, excessive HDR, CG, illustration, text, watermarks, logos.
promptZh: 一位 年轻东亚女性 站在经典的石砌露台上，取景范围从头部到大腿。她背对镜头呈四分之三侧身，身体微微向左转；双臂自然向前伸展，双手轻放在粗糙的米灰色石栏杆上。她自然地越过左肩回眸看向镜头，头部微垂，目光冷静而直接，表情克制、自信且略带清冷，双唇自然闭合。她拥有精致柔和的鹅蛋脸，杏仁状的深褐色眼睛，自然的细眉，鼻梁挺拔，嘴唇呈柔和的裸粉色。妆容清透，重点在于精致的眼线、自然的睫毛和淡淡的暖色腮红。肤色为暖米色，保留了真实的毛孔、细微的绒毛、自然的肤色变化以及轻微的高光；无塑料感的磨皮效果。乌黑的秀发松散地盘成一个略显凌乱的低发髻，头顶蓬松自然，耳畔和颈部有几缕被微风吹拂的碎发。佩戴小巧的金色垂坠耳环。她身着一件 象牙白或浅奶油色高级无袖礼服，立领设计，肩部剪裁利落，采用优质哑光丝绸或高级绉纱制成。礼服背部采用深至腰部的大型流线型露背开口，边缘干净贴合，充分展现肩胛骨和背部线条；腰部自然收紧，裙摆垂直顺滑，无图案，无多余装饰。背景为远处的层叠森林与山丘，由于长焦镜头和大气透视效果呈现出柔和的虚化。天空明亮但无可见太阳，采用薄云或阴天下的自然漫射光。肤色、白色礼服和石栏杆之间有着柔和细腻的明暗过渡，整体低饱和度、低对比度，以象牙白、暖肤色、灰褐色和柔和的森林绿为主色调。摄影风格：85mm 人像镜头，f/2 光圈，平视视角（略高于腰部），浅景深，眼神清晰，真实的镜头虚化效果，奢华高级时尚杂志大片，轻微胶片颗粒感，照片级真实。避免：正面姿势、错误的露背形状、肩膀过窄、脊柱扭曲、手指错误、塑料感皮肤、浓妆、强烈的直射阳光、过度 HDR、CG 感、插画、文字、水印、Logo。
